metadata.description: Design → plan → execute → review workflow plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: init-project
plugins.description: Interview-driven project scaffolder. Creates file layout, git repo, GitHub repo, labels, milestones, and seed issues that exec-tasks can pick up on day one.

plugins.name: exec-tasks
plugins.description: Review GitHub project issues, select unblocked high-priority tasks, spawn coding agents in parallel where possible, and create PRs that trigger automated code review.

plugins.name: post-session
plugins.description: Wrap up a session by extracting durable findings (gotchas, runbooks, preferences, repeated patterns), classifying each (new skill / skill update / memory / discard), and writing the skill-worthy ones to disk after a confirmation gate.
